title: Gilded Color HUD
description: Six custom HUD colors... with gold accents!
body:
![Gilded Color title text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd4cc1d8077d0965a5547d46e3a51a34c48bcf59.png)

# Gilded Color HUD
Custom HUD textures, themed after a color and with gold accents!

## Overview
There are a total of six colors as of now: pink, green, purple, red, blue, teal.

You can select which color to download!
In the versions page, they are in the order listed above, from top to bottom.

### Features:
Changes texture of hotbar, health bar, exp bar, armor bar, and a bit more!

### Potential Planned Features:
- More colors
   - (currently planned: lavander, potentially sky blue)
- 1.20.1 compatible version
- 32x version
- 8x version

Might make a seperate packs with elytra and GUI following this theme

 
 
*this mod's primary home is here, on Modrinth, although this mod is also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gilded-color-hud)
